subcodes.first_line: O Iskandar! Time and again hast thou attained unto the remembrance of the Wronged One. Thou hast perceived the fragrant breaths from the Robe of the All-Merciful's utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسکندر مره بعد مره بذکر مظلوم فائز شدی نفحات قمیص بیان رحمن را ادراک
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
